what_it_contains: Original GEO code, GEO-Bench loader, leaderboard links, custom GEO functions.
risk_or_overlap: Foundational; benchmark setting is simplified and should not be treated as full search pipeline.

primary_paper_or_context: What Generative Search Engines Like and How to Optimize Web Content Cooperatively
what_it_contains: Preference-rule extraction, AutoGEO_API, AutoGEO_Mini RL pipeline, datasets/checkpoints/demo links.
risk_or_overlap: Strong overlap with content rewriting; must pair with retrieval-stage evaluation.

what_it_contains: C-SEO methods, benchmark runner, citation ranking evaluation, released datasets/results.
risk_or_overlap: Essential negative-result benchmark; should be used to test new GEO claims.

what_it_contains: Optimization, answer generation, LLM judging, MIL/ICov/IStab metric computation.
risk_or_overlap: LLM judge dependency and offline simulator assumptions need validation.

what_it_contains: MAP-Elites strategy archive, co-evolving critic, multi-turn rewriting evaluation.
risk_or_overlap: Potential proxy overfitting; useful for adaptive strategy design.

what_it_contains: Ad-injected response generation benchmark, datasets and multi-agent baselines.
risk_or_overlap: Adjacent monetization layer; separate paid/ads from organic GEO.

what_it_contains: Large curated list of guides, tools, papers, industry sources, technical docs.
risk_or_overlap: Broad list mixes academic, vendor, marketing, and speculative sources; good for discovery, not evidence.

what_it_contains: Tool/vendor directory for GEO/AEO/AI visibility platforms.
risk_or_overlap: Vendor-reported; useful for market map but weak as research evidence.
Use for discovery and cross-checking only.
Needs code quality and reproducibility audit before adoption.

primary_paper_or_context: From Experience to Skill: Multi-Agent Generative Engine Optimization via Reusable Strategy Learning
what_it_contains: Multi-agent GEO framework with preference agent, planner, editor, evaluator, hierarchical memory, DSV-CF metrics, fidelity gate, and benchmark-oriented scripts.
risk_or_overlap: Overlaps with AutoGEO and AgenticGEO but adds reusable strategy learning and fidelity-aware memory; needs independent reproduction.
